work?</h4><div class="flex h-[24px] w-[24px] shrink-0 items-center justify-center transition-transform duration-300 rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" ease-out grid-rows-[0fr]"><div class="overflow-hidden"><p class="text-text-secondary whitespace-pre-wrap pb-5 font-sans text-[14px] leading-[1.6] md:text-[17px]">Credits are used to process your request and generate the final output, with usage depending on what you choose and how complex the task is.

For agent-based generation, credit consumption varies based on the tool or model selected and the level of detail in your request. For canvas generation, credits are determined by your settings, including image size and quality, desired style and detail, and any advanced parameters enabled.

In general, more complex tasks and more sophisticated settings require more credits.</p></div></div></div><div class="border-border-neutral-l2 border-b"><button class="group/trigger flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5"><h4 class="text-text-default w-[calc(100%-40px)] text-left font-sans text-[16px] font-medium leading-[1.4] md:text-[20px]">Will credits expire?</h4><div class="flex h-[24px] w-[24px] shrink-0 items-center justify-center transition-transform duration-300 rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="text-icon-default h-5 w-5 [&_path]:fill-current"><path fill="currentColor" d="M18.41 15.884a.4.4 0 0 0 .566 0l.566-.566a.4.4 0 0 0 0-.566l-6.648-6.647a.8.8 0 0 0-.28-.18.807.807 0 0 0-.85.18l-6.647 6.647a.4.4 0 0 0 0 .566l.566.566a.4.4 0 0 0 .565 0l6.081-6.081z"></path></svg></div></button><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out grid-rows-[0fr]"><div class="overflow-hidden"><p class="text-text-secondary whitespace-pre-wrap pb-5 font-sans text-[14px] leading-[1.6] md:text-[17px]">Monthly Plan Credits from your monthly subscription are valid for the duration of your current billing cycle and will automatically reset on your next billing date. Unused credits do not roll over to the next month.

Annual Plan Credits for annual subscriptions are distributed on a monthly basis. Each month's credits are valid only within that month's cycle and will automatically reset at the start of the next monthly cycle. Unused credits from the previous month will not carry over.

Top-up Credits These credits never expire and will remain in your account until used.</p></div></div></div><div class="border-border-neutral-l2 border-b"><button class="group/trigger flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5"><h4 class="text-text-default w-[calc(100%-40px)] text-left font-sans text-[16px] font-medium leading-[1.4] md:text-[20px]">Can I purchase extra credits?</h4><div class="flex h-[24px] w-[24px] shrink-0 items-center justify-center transition-transform duration-300 rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="text-icon-default h-5 w-5 [&_path]:fill-current"><path fill="currentColor" d="M18.41 15.884a.4.4 0 0 0 .566 0l.566-.566a.4.4 0 0 0 0-.566l-6.648-6.647a.8.8 0 0 0-.28-.18.807.807 0 0 0-.85.18l-6.647 6.647a.4.4 0 0 0 0 .566l.566.566a.4.4 0 0 0 .565 0l6.081-6.081z"></path></svg></div></button><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out grid-rows-[0fr]"><div class="overflow-hidden"><p class="text-text-secondary whitespace-pre-wrap pb-5 font-sans text-[14px] leading-[1.6] md:text-[17px]">If you need additional credits, you can upgrade your plan to increase your monthly limit or purchase credit packs to generate more content without changing your current subscription. Purchased credits are added instantly and can be used across all supported models.</p></div></div></div><div class="border-border-neutral-l2 border-b"><button class="group/trigger flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5"><h4 class="text-text-default w-[calc(100%-40px)] text-left font-sans text-[16px] font-medium leading-[1.4] md:text-[20px]">Is my subscription automatically renewed?</h4><div class="flex h-[24px] w-[24px] shrink-0 items-center justify-center transition-transform duration-300 rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="text-icon-default h-5 w-5 [&_path]:fill-current"><path fill="currentColor" d="M18.41 15.884a.4.4 0 0 0 .566 0l.566-.566a.4.4 0 0 0 0-.566l-6.648-6.647a.8.8 0 0 0-.28-.18.807.807 0 0 0-.85.18l-6.647 6.647a.4.4 0 0 0 0 .566l.566.566a.4.4 0 0 0 .565 0l6.081-6.081z"></path></svg></div></button><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out grid-rows-[0fr]"><div class="overflow-hidden"><p class="text-text-secondary whitespace-pre-wrap pb-5 font-sans text-[14px] leading-[1.6] md:text-[17px]">Yes. Your subscription renews automatically at the end of each billing cycle to maintain continuous access. You may cancel at any time in your account settings, and your plan will remain active through the end of the current billing period.</p></div></div></div><div class="border-border-neutral-l2 border-b"><button class="group/trigger flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5"><h4 class="text-text-default w-[calc(100%-40px)] text-left font-sans text-[16px] font-medium leading-[1.4] md:text-[20px]">How does 365 Unlimited promotion work?</h4><div class="flex h-[24px] w-[24px] shrink-0 items-center justify-center transition-transform duration-300 rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="text-icon-default h-5 w-5 [&_path]:fill-current"><path fill="currentColor" d="M18.41 15.884a.4.4 0 0 0 .566 0l.566-.566a.4.4 0 0 0 0-.566l-6.648-6.647a.8.8 0 0 0-.28-.18.807.807 0 0 0-.85.18l-6.647 6.647a.4.4 0 0 0 0 .566l.566.566a.4.4 0 0 0 .565 0l6.081-6.081z"></path></svg></div></button><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out grid-rows-[0fr]"><div class="overflow-hidden"><p class="text-text-secondary whitespace-pre-wrap pb-5 font-sans text-[14px] leading-[1.6] md:text-[17px]">365 Unlimited gives you one year of Unlimited Relax Generations on the models in your plan. Access continues while your subscription is active. If you cancel or downgrade, unlimited access ends when your current plan expires. Upgrades keep your access active for the full 12 months.

Reactivating your subscription does not extend the original 365-day period.

Automation or non-human activity may trigger a temporary suspension of access for review to ensure fair and reliable use.</p></div></div></div><div class="border-border-neutral-l2 border-b"><button class="group/trigger flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5"><h4 class="text-text-default w-[calc(100%-40px)] text-left font-sans text-[16px] font-medium leading-[1.4] md:text-[20px]">How do Fast Generation and Unlimited Relax Generation work?</h4><div class="flex h-[24px] w-[24px] shrink-0 items-center justify-center transition-transform duration-300 rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="text-icon-default h-5 w-5 [&_path]:fill-current"><path fill="currentColor" d="M18.41 15.884a.4.4 0 0 0 .566 0l.566-.566a.4.4 0 0 0 0-.566l-6.648-6.647a.8.8 0 0 0-.28-.18.807.807 0 0 0-.85.18l-6.647 6.647a.4.4 0 0 0 0 .566l.566.566a.4.4 0 0 0 .565 0l6.081-6.081z"></path></svg></div></button><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out grid-rows-[0fr]"><div class="overflow-hidden"><p class="text-text-secondary whitespace-pre-wrap pb-5 font-sans text-[14px] leading-[1.6] md:text-[17px]">**Fast Generation**

In Fast Generation mode, each generation consumes credits from your balance. The fast credits included in your subscription reset at the start of each billing cycle and do not carry over to the next month. To maximize your subscription value, we recommend utilizing your full balance before the month ends.

Please note that while subscription credits reset periodically, any credit packs purchased separately are not affected by the billing cycle and will not expire.

You can monitor your usage and view your remaining fast credit details on the manage subscription page.

**Unlimited Relax Generation**

Unlimited Relax Generation mode is available exclusively to subscribers of specific plans, allowing for Unlimited Relax Generations without consuming your fast credits. In this mode, your requests are placed in a queue and processed as system GPU resources become available. Consequently, wait times are typically longer than in Fast Generation mode. Your specific wait time depends on your usage frequency relative to other users—those who use relax mode less frequently will generally experience shorter wait times.

You can turn off Unlimited Relax Generation at any time to switch back to Fast Generation for immediate results. Please note that queue priority varies by tier: Basic, Pro, and Ultimate users are assigned to different waiting queues.

This feature is for personal use only. Cheating, account sharing, or resale is strictly prohibited. Access may be temporarily suspended if any abnormal activity is detected.</p></div></div></div><div class="border-border-neutral-l2 border-b"><button class="group/trigger flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5"><h4 class="text-text-default w-[calc(100%-40px)] text-left font-sans text-[16px] font-medium leading-[1.4] md:text-[20px]">How many devices can I use with one account?</h4><div class="flex h-[24px] w-[24px] shrink-0 items-center justify-center transition-transform duration-300 rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="text-icon-default h-5 w-5 [&_path]:fill-current"><path fill="currentColor" d="M18.41 15.884a.4.4 0 0 0 .566 0l.566-.566a.4.4 0 0 0 0-.566l-6.648-6.647a.8.8 0 0 0-.28-.18.807.807 0 0 0-.85.18l-6.647 6.647a.4.4 0 0 0 0 .566l.566.566a.4.4 0 0 0 .565 0l6.081-6.081z"></path></svg></div></button><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out grid-rows-[0fr]"><div class="overflow-hidden"><p class="text-text-secondary whitespace-pre-wrap pb-5 font-sans text-[14px] leading-[1.6] md:text-[17px]">Lovart accounts are for individual use only. To prevent account sharing or abusive behavior that may excessively consume resources and affect platform stability, tasks can run simultaneously on up to 2 desktop Web, 1 mobile Web. For team or multi-user usage, please purchase the Team Plan.</p></div></div></div><div class="border-border-neutral-l2 border-b"><button class="group/trigger flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-between py-5"><h4 class="text-text-default w-[calc(100%-40px)] text-left font-sans text-[16px] font-medium leading-[1.4] md:text-[20px]">Can I upgrade my plan?</h4><div class="flex h-[24px] w-[24px] shrink-0 items-center justify-center transition-transform duration-300 rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="text-icon-default h-5 w-5 [&_path]:fill-current"><path fill="currentColor" d="M18.41 15.884a.4.4 0 0 0 .566 0l.566-.566a.4.4 0 0 0 0-.566l-6.648-6.647a.8.8 0 0 0-.28-.18.807.807 0 0 0-.85.18l-6.647 6.647a.4.4 0 0 0 0 .566l.566.566a.4.4 0 0 0 .565 0l6.081-6.081z"></path></svg></div></button><div class="grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out grid-rows-[0fr]"><div class="overflow-hidden"><p class="text-text-secondary whitespace-pre-wrap pb-5 font-sans text-[14px] leading-[1.6] md:text-[17px]">Once you have an active subscription, you can upgrade at any time by paying the price difference.
